title: SOME QUESTION ABOUT EVANGELION
wikitext:
[]: SOME QUESTION ABOUT EVANGELION             Quote Post by Sayajin » Sat Aug 18, 2018 3:24 pm I've just finished to watch all the series and the end of evangelion, but i'm pretty confused about some things: 1) Why in the end of evangelion Shinji chokes Asuka? 2) If Shinji reject the humanaty instrumentality project, why there are only Shinji and Asuka at the end? Where is the humanity? 3) If in the Eva there are human souls (Eva 01 has Shinji's mother soul and Eva 02 has Asuka's mother soul), what soul is inside the Eva 00? Sorry for bad english

[]: Re: SOME QUESTION ABOUT EVANGELION             Quote Post by Blockio » Sat Aug 18, 2018 4:17 pm All of those have been discussed in great detail on here before, so I'll link you the threads, hope you get something out of them 1) This thread might be what you are looking for 2) Oh boy do we have many threads discussing instrumentality and it's aftermath 3) See all of those threads EDIT: I just realised that I probably sound like a sarcastical asshole. Be assured that this is not my intent

[]: Re: SOME QUESTION ABOUT EVANGELION             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Aug 18, 2018 4:24 pm 1) this has been endlessly debated. A semi-official answer from an Evangelion card game is that he did it to prove she was real 2) the generally accepted answer is that other people could return at other places, also the two pilots were probably amongst the very first to do so 3) As we see in episode 14, it's a piece of Rei(Lilith). The last is the only one of these three questions with a reasonably firm answer . My own reading of the final scene was very different to the consensus above (being in part a continuation of what happened in Instrumentality).

[]: Re: SOME QUESTION ABOUT EVANGELION             Quote Post by anatrok » Sun Aug 19, 2018 3:58 am So a few caveats: This is going to be my interpretation based my thoughts and discussions with others. I am approaching this from character motivation perspective. I am assuming the beach scene is REAL WORLD. I'm assuming that both EOTV and EOE happen concurrently. I try to avoid projecting myself on the characters (you judge how well I did). Sayajin wrote: 1) Why in the end of Evangelion Shinji chokes Asuka?

[]: Re: SOME QUESTION ABOUT EVANGELION             Quote Post by testnameC09 » Tue Aug 28, 2018 9:52 am As we know every Impact (2nd, 3rd etc) opens the Doors of Guf, which transforms all Lilith-based life forms to LCL soup . So a question is why didn't SEELE stop on 2nd Impact?
